title: Conversation Summary
summary:
**Structured Summary of the Transcript** --- ### 1. Participants & Context - **Interviewee:** Suganya - **Interviewer:** Shekar (Scalars content team) - **Purpose of Call:** Debrief Suganya’s interview experience at **Loews India** and gather feedback for future candidates. --- ### 2. Interview Overview | Aspect | Details | |--------|---------| | **Number of Rounds** | 3 rounds (initially mentioned as 4, clarified to 3) | | **Round 1** | Excel test | | **Round 2** | Technical/behavioral mix – focus on:
• Prior work experience
• Knowledge of retail & Lowe’s operations
• Understanding of vendors, supply‑chain laws, omnichannel concepts
• No SQL, Python, or advanced Excel questions | | **Round 3 (Manager round)** | Similar behavioral focus:
• Conflict‑resolution scenarios with peers
• Collaboration across teams
• Retail/omnichannel knowledge
• No deep technical drilling | --- ### 3. Outcome & Next Steps - **Feedback:** Suganya received *positive* feedback; her performance was rated well. - **Current Status:** After the final round, her profile was placed **on hold** because Lowe’s needed only one candidate for the role. - **Action Taken:** Lowe’s moved her profile to another manager for the same position. - **Expected Update:** She anticipates a call **within this week or next week** from HR. - **Recent Activity:** Suganya called to check the status today and received an update that she has not been rejected; the hold is due to limited openings. --- ### 4. Other Interview Prospects - No other interview opportunities are currently lined up. --- ### 5. Advice for Future Candidates (from Shekar) - Document the complete interview experience (questions asked,
